framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 git commit-msg hook bypassed by direct shell commits
framework_bugs.reproduction: In a project with no active build loop, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` from the shell
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked by BL-006 commit-message gate / pre-commit-gate.sh
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded with RC=0; pre-commit-gate.sh only intercepts via Claude Code PreToolUse path, not via git hooks. Direct shell git commits bypass BL-006 entirely.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-010 / BL-006 documentation does not clearly state that direct shell `git commit` bypasses the BL-006 gate (only PreToolUse via Claude Code enforces it). Consider documenting this limitation or installing a git commit-msg hook for shell parity.

framework_bugs.summary: Production deployment blocked from Phase 4 by mis-set poc_mode (PR #19 regression)
framework_bugs.reproduction: bash $FRAMEWORK/init.sh --non-interactive --project test --platform web --deployment organizational --gov-mode production --language typescript --project-dir /tmp/test --git-host other --remote-url https://example.com/fake.git --branch-protection-attested --visibility private --allow-existing-dir; cd /tmp/test; bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/process-checklist.sh --start-phase4
framework_bugs.expected: Phase 4 starts (production deployments must be able to enter Phase 4; only POC scenarios should be blocked)
framework_bugs.actual: RC=1, '[FAIL] Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in production mode.' .claude/phase-state.json shows poc_mode="production". Root cause: init.sh line 3217 (non-interactive path) sets POC_MODE="$GOV_MODE" verbatim, including for --gov-mode production. The interactive path (init.sh line 381) correctly sets POC_MODE="" for Production, then writes poc_mode=null. The non-interactive path writes poc_mode="production", and process-checklist.sh start_phase4() (line 540) blocks on any non-null/non-empty poc_mode. Fix: in init.sh non-interactive dispatcher, map GOV_MODE=production -> POC_MODE="" (only sponsored_poc/private_poc should propagate). Affects every production project initialized via --non-interactive (i.e., all PR #19-driven flows).

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ (pre-existing, not from this agent). Framework HEAD unchanged at d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494

summary: Critical PR #19 regression: --non-interactive mode mis-sets poc_mode="production" for production deployments, blocking Phase 4 entry. Confirmed U-C and U-D still open. All other Section A-G assertions pass.
